headline: Emerson Electric (EMR) Faces A Zacks Downgrade, Is The Discount To Fair Value Enough?
summary: Emerson Electric (EMR) is back in focus after its Zacks Rank shifted to #4 (Sell), as earnings estimates eased and the stock fell 2.52%, underperforming the broader market in the latest session. See our latest analysis for Emerson Electric. At a share price of $135.38, Emerson Electric has seen short term share price momentum fade, with the 7 day and 30 day share price returns down 4.37% and 5.38%, respectively.
